args.subject: Action Item from Team Meeting — Initial Phase Coordination
args.body:
Hi David,

During the Team Meeting (May 17, 2024) you were assigned to coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase. Please:

- Schedule the kickoff with the development team.
- Share the initial plan, timeline, and list of owners.
- Confirm progress and any blockers.

Deadline: 2024-05-20.

Please confirm when the kickoff is scheduled or tell me if you need help or resources.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
